caption: A realistic video of a Texas Hold'em poker event at a casino. The same male player—late 30s, medium build, short dark hair, light stubble—still in his navy blazer, charcoal tee, dark jeans, and stainless-steel watch—sits upright and begins neatly arranging the stacks of chips in front of him, methodically straightening and organizing the piles. The dealer continues dealing, and rows of slot machines pulse in the background. The camera captures the composed, purposeful movements at the well-lit table. Wide shot to medium close-up.
